qt_plugin_notes: PyInstaller collected PySide6 Qt runtime through the versioned spec.
fix_summary: Manual Objects single-keep click now saves the current group and advances to the next unreviewed group within the same reason and N bucket.
The auto-next checkbox is now interpreted as click-save-and-next within the same N bucket, not merely as a post-save navigation preference.
Multi-keep mode disables click-save-and-next to preserve deliberate multi-item review.
YOLO txt labels can be rendered as bounding boxes directly on Manual Objects preview thumbnails.
Thumbnail cache keys now include label path, label size, label mtime, and bbox overlay state.
Manual Objects image loading remains on-demand and asynchronous after selecting a concrete group.

external_code_policy.labelimg_review: The bbox display requirement was compared with the LabelImg-style annotation viewing workflow.
external_code_policy.implementation: Fresh lightweight YOLO label parser and PIL-based overlay renderer in the V3.0.3 package.
